metadata.name: GithubStarsIndex
metadata.description: 自动抓取 GitHub Stars，生成 AI 摘要，便于检索。

summary.zh: 该工具自动抓取 GitHub Stars 并调用 AI 生成内容摘要与技术标签，内置标签归一化治理机制。支持 GitHub Actions 定时增量同步、Jinja2 模板渲染静态页，并可选同步至 Obsidian 或 GitHub Pages，是高效管理个人技术栈与知识库的自动化利器。
summary.en: This tool automatically fetches GitHub Stars and uses AI to generate content summaries and tech tags, featuring built-in tag normalization. It supports scheduled incremental sync via GitHub Actions, Jinja2 template rendering for static pages, and optional sync to Obsidian or GitHub Pages, serving as an automated solution for managing personal tech stacks and knowledge bases.

metadata.name: QwenPaw
metadata.description: Your Personal AI Assistant; easy to install, deploy on your own machine or on the cloud; supports multiple chat apps with easily extensible capabilities.

summary.zh: QwenPaw是一款个人AI助手，支持本地/云端部署与多平台集成，具备可扩展技能模块。核心优势包括数据隐私保护、PDF/Office文件处理、智能调度及新闻聚合功能，通过模块化架构实现跨应用自动化任务处理。
summary.en: QwenPaw is a personal AI assistant with local/cloud deployment and multi-platform integration. Key features include data privacy control, PDF/Office processing, intelligent scheduling, and news aggregation through modular extensible architecture for cross-application automation.

metadata.name: sms_forwarding
metadata.description: 超低成本硬件短信转发器，支持移动联通电信，ML307R+ESP32C3

summary.zh: 本项目是一款超低成本的硬件短信转发器，基于 ESP32C3 与 ML307R 模块构建，总成本约 28 元。支持移动/联通/电信卡，具备多通道推送（Bark、钉钉、飞书等）、Web 后台管理及远程重启功能，适用于保号、验证码接收及物联网通知场景。
summary.en: An ultra-low-cost hardware SMS forwarding device built on ESP32C3 and ML307R modules, costing around $4. It supports all major carriers, multi-channel push notifications (Bark, DingTalk, Feishu), Web management, and remote reboot, ideal for number retention, OTP reception, and IoT alerts.

metadata.name: GithubStarsManager
metadata.description: An app for managing github starred repositories.

summary.zh: GithubStarsManager 是一款跨平台桌面应用，专为解决 GitHub 用户“Star 后难以检索”的痛点。它通过 AI 自动对 Star 仓库进行分类与摘要，支持语义搜索、Release 追踪及 Gist 管理。采用 Electron 架构，数据 100% 本地存储，提供安全高效的个人代码资产管理体验。
summary.en: GithubStarsManager is a cross-platform desktop app designed to solve the "starred but lost" problem for GitHub users. It leverages AI to automatically categorize and summarize starred repositories, featuring semantic search, release tracking, and Gist management. Built on Electron with 100% local data storage, it offers a secure and efficient experience for personal code asset management.
